near_miss_vectors.description: Different mandate_id → None (even if prompt matches)
Same prompt_instance_id skipped (handled by exact-hit path)

near_miss_vectors.invariant: Near-miss failure falls through to full compute without error

delta_within_reuse_semantics.trigger: exact cache miss + near-miss candidate within max_diff_percent
delta_within_reuse_semantics.action: delta-compute against cached baseline instead of full recompute
delta_within_reuse_semantics.output: new proof bundle (not cached baseline) with delta_within_reuse metadata
delta_within_reuse_semantics.invalidation: inherits from proof_cache — policy change and mandate revision invalidate near-miss candidates
